name: Strawberry-Rhubarb Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 package unsweetened, frozen rhubarb -- 16 ounces, completely thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425 degrees.
2. Prepare the pastry according to package instructions.
3. In a large bowl, mix together sugar, flour, and orange peel.
4. Stir in the rhubarb and strawberries until combined.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared pastry-lined pie plate.
6. Dot the top with margarine or butter.
7. Cover with the top crust, making slits in it for ventilation.
8. Seal and flute the edges of the crust.
9. Sprinkle additional sugar on top if desired.
10. Place a strip of aluminum foil around the edge to prevent excessive browning.
11. Bake for 55 minutes or until the crust is brown and juice begins to bubble through the slits in the crust.
8 SERVINGS; 480 CALORIES PER SERVING.
